'''Narnee Bomu''' was a male [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] soldier and a member of the [[Bomu Clan]].

==Biography==
He worked for [[Vago Gejalli Thokka|Vago]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and the [[Anjiliac]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] along with a number of his clan during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

Narnee and another Bomu soldier, [[Seedar Bomu]], was hired by Vago to find a treacherous partner of Popara who had stolen one hundred thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in [[Spice/Legends|spice]]. Vago, not completely trusting the Bomus, put tracker devices in their [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. The Bomus [[Death/Legends|killed]] the buyer of the spice with a sudden explosion, although it is unclear if they managed to recover the spice - Some believe that Vago had to send [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] with the same prey after the Bomus' failure.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' {{1st}}
